samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Serial-to-Parallel Conversion Circuit</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data (8 bits wide).</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="RESET">Reset state.</state>
        <state name="COUNTING">Counting state.</state>
        <constant name="DATA_WIDTH">8</constant>
        <constant name="CNT_WIDTH">4</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt" width="4">4-bit counter to track the number of received serial inputs.</reg>
        <reg id="dout_parallel" width="8">8-bit parallel output data.</reg>
        <reg id="dout_valid">Valid output signal for the parallel data.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        Always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                cnt <= 4'b0;
                dout_parallel <= 8'b0;
                dout_valid <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                if (din_valid) begin
                    if (cnt == 4'd7) begin
                        dout_parallel[7:0] <= {dout_parallel[6:0], din_serial};
                        dout_valid <= 1'b1;
                        cnt <= 4'b0;
                    end else begin
                        dout_parallel[7:0] <= {dout_parallel[6:0], din_serial};
                        dout_valid <= 1'b0;
                        cnt <= cnt + 1;
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
```
